1	import type { PageLoad } from './$types'
2	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client'
3	import { gql } from 'graphql-request'
4	
5	const RUN_DETAIL_QUERY = gql`
6		query RunDetail($id: ID!) {
7			run(id: $id) {
8				id
9				layer
10				status
11				projectID
12				beadId
13				parentRunId
14				childRunIds
15				startedAt
16				completedAt
17				durationMs
18	
19				queueInputs
20				stopCondition
21				selectedBeadIds
22	
23				baseRevision
24				resultRevision
25				worktreePath
26				mergeOutcome
27				checkResults
28	
29				harness
30				provider
31				model
32				promptSummary
33				powerMin
34				powerMax
35				tokensIn
36				tokensOut
37				costUsd
38				outputExcerpt
39				evidenceLinks
40			}
41		}
42	`
43	
44	export interface RunDetail {
45		id: string
46		layer: string
47		status: string
48		projectID: string | null
49		beadId: string | null
50		parentRunId: string | null
51		childRunIds: string[]
52		startedAt: string | null
53		completedAt: string | null
54		durationMs: number | null
55	
56		queueInputs: string | null
57		stopCondition: string | null
58		selectedBeadIds: string[] | null
59	
60		baseRevision: string | null
61		resultRevision: string | null
62		worktreePath: string | null
63		mergeOutcome: string | null
64		checkResults: string | null
65	
66		harness: string | null
67		provider: string | null
68		model: string | null
69		promptSummary: string | null
70		powerMin: number | null
71		powerMax: number | null
72		tokensIn: number | null
73		tokensOut: number | null
74		costUsd: number | null
75		outputExcerpt: string | null
76		evidenceLinks: string[] | null
77	}
78	
79	const PARENT_RUN_QUERY = gql`
80		query ParentRunParent($id: ID!) {
81			run(id: $id) {
82				parentRunId
83			}
84		}
85	`
86	
87	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, fetch }) => {
88		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
89		const data = await client.request<{ run: RunDetail | null }>(RUN_DETAIL_QUERY, {
90			id: params.runId
91		})
92	
93		let grandparentRunId: string | null = null
94		if (data.run?.layer === 'run' && data.run.parentRunId) {
95			const parentData = await client.request<{ run: { parentRunId: string | null } | null }>(
96				PARENT_RUN_QUERY,
97				{ id: data.run.parentRunId }
98			)
99			grandparentRunId = parentData.run?.parentRunId ?? null
100		}
101	
102		return {
103			nodeId: params.nodeId,
104			projectId: params.projectId,
105			runId: params.runId,
106			run: data.run,
107			grandparentRunId
108		}
109	}

1	import { defineConfig } from '@playwright/test';
2	import path from 'node:path';
3	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
4	
5	const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
6	
7	// The default Playwright harness boots the Go DDx server against a temp copy
8	// of e2e/fixtures/ so the API endpoints exercised by TC-008 (and other
9	// backend-dependent specs) return real data without reading the developer's
10	// $HOME or the repository's live .ddx/ state.
11	
12	const CLI_PKG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../..');
13	const FRONTEND_DIR = __dirname;
14	const FIXTURE_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'e2e/fixtures');
15	const PORT = Number(process.env.DDX_E2E_PORT ?? 4174);
16	const BASE_URL = `https://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`;
17	
18	// Build the SvelteKit frontend (so cli/internal/server/embed.go has assets to
19	// embed), copy the fixture workspace into a fresh temp dir, build the ddx
20	// binary from the cli module, and exec it from the temp dir. The temp dir has
21	// no .git so FindProjectRoot falls back to it, and tsnet is disabled so the
22	// harness has no Tailscale dependency.
23	const bootCommand = [
24		`set -e`,
25		`(cd "${FRONTEND_DIR}" && bun run build >&2)`,
26		`TMP=$(mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX)`,
27		`cp -R "${FIXTURE_DIR}/." "$TMP/"`,
28		`(cd "${CLI_PKG_DIR}" && go build -o "$TMP/ddx" .)`,
29		`cd "$TMP"`,
30		`exec ./ddx server --tsnet=false --addr=127.0.0.1 --port=${PORT}`
31	].join(' && ');
32	
33	export default defineConfig({
34		webServer: {
35			command: `bash -c '${bootCommand}'`,
36			url: `${BASE_URL}/api/health`,
37			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true,
38			reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
39			timeout: 180_000,
40			stdout: 'pipe',
41			stderr: 'pipe'
42		},
43		use: {
44			baseURL: BASE_URL,
45			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true
46		},
47		testMatch: ['**/*.e2e.{ts,js}', 'e2e/**/*.spec.ts']
48	});
